financial.note: Provides credit facilities for inventory and is a strategic partner through KASIKORN LINE (LINE BK) for digital lending services (UFund).
Significant institutional shareholder via provident funds; sensitivity to interest rates on corporate debentures used for retail expansion.

supply_chain.note: Core revenue driver via Studio 7; earnings are heavily weighted toward iPhone (iPhone 17/18) and MacBook launch cycles.
Key supplier for Android flagship sales (Galaxy S26); success of high-end foldable segments drives ASP (Average Selling Price).
Operates and manages True Shop outlets via subsidiary Double Seven (DOU7); revenue is tied to mobile subscriber acquisition and handset bundles.
Strategic diversification into EV distribution through subsidiary Gold Integrate; success depends on Thai EV adoption rates.

equity_cross_holdings.note: Installment lending arm for smartphones; critical for driving sales volume in the middle-to-low income segments.
Manages True Shop operations; ownership increased post-exit from SABUY share-swap agreement.
Generates high-margin recurring revenue from Apple-authorized service and maintenance.

competitors.note: Direct rival in Apple product retail and educational sector distribution.
Competes in mobile retail and synergy-based consumer financing (Singer Thailand).
Competes in premium lifestyle gadgets and Apple premium reseller market.

macro_commodity_factors.logic: Import-heavy business; THB depreciation increases landed cost of devices, potentially squeezing retail margins.
Surges in RAM/SSD costs inflate BOM (Bill of Materials), forcing price hikes on PCs and laptops which may dampen demand.
Directly correlates with discretionary spending on high-ticket technology and consumer electronics.
